_comment_theme: The core thematic direction for the AI to build songs off of.
_comment_musicStyle: The main creative brief for the music. This can be compact genre tags or a richer description, similar to the original lesson's 'Describe the music' field.
musicStyle: lofi hip hop, chill, ambient, jazz piano, soft drums
_comment_songLengthHint: Optional target song length guidance, e.g. 'around 2 minutes' or '90 seconds max'. This mirrors the original lesson note that duration can be hinted in the input.
_comment_conceptProvider: How R45 should get song concepts: 'auto', 'gemini', 'saved-concepts', or 'local-intake'. This keeps the idea layer swappable if you later move from Gemini to another provider.
_comment_engine: Standard option: 'suno-api' (local hybrid wrapper). Also supports 'lyria', 'suno', and 'suno-cdn'.
_comment_sunoApiBaseUrl: Required only when engine is 'suno-api'. Point this to your local Suno wrapper service.
_comment_sunoModel: Optional Suno model ID. Leave blank to use the wrapper default, or set this per account tier once verified.
_comment_songConceptsPath: Optional path to a saved manifest or concept JSON. Set this to bypass Gemini concept generation during repeated Suno tests.
_comment_ideaIntakePath: Optional path to a local TXT or JSON intake file for new concept ideas when you do not want to use Gemini. One idea per line in TXT works well.
_comment_ideaSeeds: Optional inline idea seeds (strings or objects). Used only when songConceptsPath is empty. Leave empty if you prefer ideaIntakePath or Gemini.
_comment_skipTimestamps: Set true to skip Gemini YouTube timestamp generation. Useful for Suno-only production tests or when Gemini quota is exhausted.
_comment_cleanupOutput: Set false to disable automatic housekeeping of output/ before dry or live runs. Default true keeps the folder tidy and archives stale test runs into output/.archive.
_comment_outputRetention: How many visible runs of each type to keep in output/. Older runs are moved into the hidden output/.archive folder.
_comment_sunoSongIds: Required when engine is 'suno-cdn'. Get IDs from suno.com/me — hover a track and copy from the URL.
_comment_coverImagePath: Absolute or relative path to the still image used for video generation. The original lesson used a user-uploaded landscape image.
_comment_videoResolution: Target output resolution for the final video. The original ffmpeg-api workflow rendered a 1280:720 landscape video.
